issues.description: Trigger should be 'Activated' with zone context 'Board' (this is an activate ability on a Character in play), not 'Activated' from hand. The action should trash THIS character (self), not exclude self.
Action type is 'TrashFromHand' but card is on board being activated. Should be 'TrashFromBoard' or similar self-trash action. Also excludeSelf:true contradicts 'trash this Character'.
Missing condition: 'HasLife' with value 2 or less. The effect requires 'If you have 2 or less Life cards' as a mandatory condition.
Second effect trigger 'Trigger' is vague and disconnected. Should be part of single Activated effect with chained/conditional actions. Missing DrawCard action for 'Then, draw 1 card'.
Missing second action: DrawCard (for 'Then, draw 1 card'). KO action appears standalone without proper sequencing.
thenActions array is empty but should contain conditional logic: if trashed, then perform KO and draw. Structure should chain properly.
